top3.sql:
SELECT income.date_received
FROM member
JOIN income ON member.member_id = income.link_to_member
WHERE member.first_name = 'Connor' AND member.last_name = 'Hilton' AND income.source = 'dues';

SELECT i.date_received
FROM member m
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
WHERE m.first_name = 'Connor' AND m.last_name = 'Hilton' AND i.source = 'dues';

SELECT income.date_received
FROM member
JOIN income ON member.member_id = income.link_to_member
WHERE member.first_name = 'Connor' AND member.last_name = 'Hilton' AND income.source = 'dues';

SELECT i.date_received
FROM member m
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
WHERE m.first_name = 'Connor' AND m.last_name = 'Hilton' AND i.source = 'dues';

SELECT income.date_received
FROM member
JOIN income ON member.member_id = income.link_to_member
WHERE member.first_name = 'Connor' AND member.last_name = 'Hilton' AND income.source = 'dues';

SELECT i.date_received
FROM member m
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
WHERE m.first_name = 'Connor' AND m.last_name = 'Hilton' AND i.source = 'dues';

SELECT income.date_received
FROM member
JOIN income ON member.member_id = income.link_to_member
WHERE member.first_name = 'Connor' AND member.last_name = 'Hilton' AND income.notes LIKE '%dues%';

final.sql:
SELECT income.date_received
FROM member
JOIN income ON member.member_id = income.link_to_member
WHERE member.first_name = 'Connor' AND member.last_name = 'Hilton' AND income.source = 'dues';
